agent_output: {"handoff_brief":{"recipient":"Shaq","task_context":"Implement the Order Fulfillment state management system. Bird has defined the domain invariants governing order state transitions and refund eligibility. MJ has designed the architecture: a PATCH endpoint for state changes, an OrderStateMachine for transition validation, and a separate RefundService that verifies order state before issuing refunds. Your job is to turn these specs into production-ready code with tests.","domain_rules":[{"rule":"An order cannot transition from SHIPPED to PENDING","testable_assertion":"Calling transition(SHIPPED, PENDING) on OrderStateMachine throws/returns ORDER_STATE_INVALID"},{"rule":"A refund can only be issued on a DELIVERED order","testable_assertion":"RefundService.issue(orderId) rejects with an error when the order state is anything other than DELIVERED"}],"architecture_guidance":[{"decision":"State transitions validated in an OrderStateMachine class","implementation_note":"OrderStateMachine owns the full transition matrix. The PATCH endpoint delegates to it — no transition logic in the controller. This keeps the invariant enforceable regardless of entry point (API, event handler, CLI)."},{"decision":"PATCH /orders/{id}/state endpoint for state changes","implementation_note":"Accepts a target state in the request body. Returns 200 on success, 409 Conflict with error code ORDER_STATE_INVALID on illegal transitions. Use PATCH (not PUT) because we are modifying a single field, not replacing the resource."},{"decision":"RefundService is a separate service that calls the order service to verify state","implementation_note":"RefundService must query the current order state before issuing a refund — it does not maintain its own copy of order state. This avoids dual-write inconsistency. If the order is not DELIVERED, RefundService rejects the request without side effects."}],"acceptance_criteria":[{"criterion":"Illegal state transition is rejected","given":"An order in SHIPPED state","when":"A revert-to-PENDING transition is attempted via PATCH /orders/{id}/state","then":"The request is rejected with HTTP 409 and error code ORDER_STATE_INVALID"},{"criterion":"Refund requires DELIVERED state","given":"An order in any state other than DELIVERED","when":"A refund is requested via RefundService","then":"The refund is rejected with an error indicating the order is not in DELIVERED state"},{"criterion":"Refund succeeds on DELIVERED order","given":"An order in DELIVERED state","when":"A refund is requested via RefundService","then":"The refund is issued successfully"},{"criterion":"Valid state transitions succeed","given":"An order in a state with a legal forward transition (e.g., PENDING to SHIPPED)","when":"The transition is attempted via PATCH /orders/{id}/state","then":"The order state is updated and HTTP 200 is returned"}],"terminology_alignment":[{"domain_term":"Invariant","technical_term":"Validation rule / guard clause","definition":"A condition that must always hold true in the domain. Implemented as a check in OrderStateMachine that throws or returns an error when violated."},{"domain_term":"ORDER_STATE_INVALID","technical_term":"409 Conflict response with error code","definition":"The error code returned when a caller attempts an illegal state transition. Maps to HTTP 409 at the API boundary."},{"domain_term":"State transition","technical_term":"OrderStateMachine.transition(currentState, targetState)","definition":"A directed, validated move from one order state to another. The state machine defines which transitions are legal."}],"contradictions_resolved":[],"open_questions":[]},"escalations":[],"confidence":{"level":90,"high_confidence_areas":["Domain invariants are clearly defined by Bird with explicit acceptance criteria","Architecture boundaries between OrderStateMachine and RefundService are well-drawn by MJ","No contradictions between Bird's domain rules and MJ's architecture"],"low_confidence_areas":["Full set of valid state transitions not enumerated — only the SHIPPED->PENDING prohibition is explicit. Shaq may need to confirm the complete transition matrix with Bird.","Refund error code not specified — Bird defined ORDER_STATE_INVALID for transitions but did not name the refund-specific error code"],"assumptions":["The order states include at minimum: PENDING, SHIPPED, DELIVERED (implied by the rules). There may be others (CANCELLED, RETURNED, etc.) not yet specified.","RefundService communicates with the order service via direct method call or internal API, not async messaging — MJ said 'calls' the order service."]}}
